title: Marketplace Manager - FabHotels - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FabHotels - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the FabHotels family as a Marketplace Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
